---
title: "Konfiguracja eksperymentu i lista probek (manifest R)"
subtitle: "`configs/experiment.yaml` — zgodnie z PDF: podzial 70/15/15 w `prepare_dataset`; klatki w `frames.jpg_dir`"
format: html
---

Analog `aaop.config.load_experiment()` oraz lista probek jak w `collect_first_frame_per_video()` (**`lab05_cnn/dataset.py`**).

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false
required <- c("yaml", "jsonlite")
missing <- required[!vapply(required, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(missing)) {
  stop("Zainstaluj pakiety: ", paste(missing, collapse = ", "))
}
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x) || identical(x, "")) y else x
```

```{r}
#| label: paths-and-yaml
repo_root <- normalizePath("..", mustWork = TRUE)
cfg_path <- file.path(repo_root, "configs", "experiment.yaml")
cfg <- yaml::read_yaml(cfg_path)

art_root <- Sys.getenv("AAOP_ARTIFACT_ROOT", unset = "")
base_dir <- if (nzchar(art_root)) normalizePath(art_root, mustWork = FALSE) else repo_root
if (!dir.exists(base_dir)) dir.create(base_dir, recursive = TRUE)

reports_rel <- cfg$paths$reports_dir %||% "reports"
models_rel <- cfg$paths$models_dir %||% "models"
fig_dir <- file.path(base_dir, reports_rel, "figury")
model_dir <- file.path(base_dir, models_rel)
dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(model_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

frames_root <- file.path(repo_root, cfg$frames$jpg_dir)
list(
  repo_root = repo_root,
  frames_root = frames_root,
  fig_dir = fig_dir,
  model_dir = model_dir,
  seed = cfg$seed %||% 42L,
  l5_batch = cfg$l5_cnn$batch_size %||% 16L,
  l5_epochs = cfg$l5_cnn$epochs %||% 15L,
  l5_lr = cfg$l5_cnn$lr %||% 1e-3
)
```

Po jednej klatce na folder wideo (`train` / `val` / `test`), etykiety jak kolejnosc sortowanych klas:

```{r}
#| label: collect-frames
collect_first_frame_per_video <- function(frames_split_dir) {
  class_dirs <- list.dirs(frames_split_dir, full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE)
  class_dirs <- sort(class_dirs)
  pairs <- vector("list", 0)

  for (ci in seq_along(class_dirs)) {
    cdir <- class_dirs[[ci]]
    vdirs <- list.dirs(cdir, full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE)
    vdirs <- sort(vdirs)
    lab <- ci - 1L
    for (vd in vdirs) {
      jpgs <- sort(Sys.glob(file.path(vd, "*.jpg")))
      if (!length(jpgs)) jpgs <- sort(Sys.glob(file.path(vd, "*.jpeg")))
      if (!length(jpgs)) next
      pairs[[length(pairs) + 1L]] <- list(path = jpgs[[1L]], label = lab)
    }
  }

  if (!length(pairs)) {
    return(data.frame(path = character(), label = integer(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
  }

  paths <- vapply(pairs, `[[`, character(1L), "path")
  labs <- vapply(pairs, `[[`, integer(1L), "label")
  data.frame(path = paths, label = labs, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

train_df <- collect_first_frame_per_video(file.path(frames_root, "train"))
val_df <- collect_first_frame_per_video(file.path(frames_root, "val"))
test_df <- collect_first_frame_per_video(file.path(frames_root, "test"))

num_classes <- if (nrow(train_df)) length(unique(train_df$label)) else 0L
knitr::kable(head(train_df, 5))
list(
  n_train = nrow(train_df),
  n_val = nrow(val_df),
  n_test = nrow(test_df),
  num_classes = num_classes
)
```

```{r}
#| label: save-manifests
sample_manifest_path <- file.path(fig_dir, "r_mirror_sample_manifest.json")
jsonlite::write_json(
  list(train = train_df, val = val_df, test = test_df),
  sample_manifest_path,
  pretty = TRUE
)
basename(sample_manifest_path)
```
